text: Ma, need you overnight the seventeenth. Ava has a final. Confirm please.
Got it. I will come in the afternoon and stay through breakfast.
Confirmed Saturday the fifth. Ten thirty at Saint Bernards. Do not be late.
If Colleen falls through the seventeenth I can do the overnight but I need to know by the fifteenth.
